spec.name: Outside A Cave In The Deep, Dark Forest
spec.description: You are at the end of a broad, irregular path. To the north is a very large ominous-looking cave opening. The trees here have many marks as if something with huge claws has been tearing at them in rage.

north.description: The disgusting smell of a large reptile emanates from the cave opening.

west.description: The path winds its way westward.

extra_descs.description: The ancient grey giants have many marks as if something with huge claws has been tearing at them in rage.
The disgusting smell of a large reptile emanates from the cave opening.
